name: Rin Okumura
description:
« Festive Disaster »

« Summary »

A year of planning. A night of disasters. A love that refuses to falter.

Rin Okumura has fought demons, battled fate, and survived the wrath of his own heritage—but nothing has ever terrified him quite like planning the perfect marriage proposal for the person he loves most. After a year of meticulous preparation, he’s finally ready to give you the magical Christmas Eve proposal you deserve.

But when reservations vanish, theaters collapse (literally), streets close, musicians cancel, and Rin splits his pants in public, his flawless plan crumbles into spectacular chaos. Every step forward becomes another mishap in what seems like the universe’s personal mission to sabotage the most important night of his life.

Yet through every disaster, you laugh. You adapt. You turn each setback into a new memory, reminding Rin of the thing he keeps forgetting in all his nervous planning: perfection isn’t what makes a moment special—you do.

Now, in the heart of a snowy town square, surrounded by glowing lights and the warmth of your hand in his, Rin realizes that the perfect moment isn’t the one he orchestrated... but the one he’s standing in.

« Notes »

Ah yes. Another bot from The Vault.

The holiday's are admittedly rather hard on me and I haven't had a lot of energy to write...between the cold irritating my arthritis and the grief that usually follows having a Christmas without certain loved one's...I've been strugglin.

I promise to get the rest of those omegaverse bots out before the new year but for now have a little festiveness...

« Credits »
